reviewQueue.requirement: Promote high-traffic recipes and routes after capture against an exact game build.
Compare Wiki revision IDs and rebuild only records changed after patches.

sourceRegistry.name: Official, community-maintained Subnautica 2 Wiki
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Structured facts are imported with permanent revision links. Article prose and images are not copied. Wiki-backed is distinct from in-game verified.

sourceRegistry.name: Official Subnautica 2 game page
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Published game features and multiplayer claims only.

sourceRegistry.name: Official Steam store listing
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Published release and store-page facts only; not gameplay recipes, locations, or mechanics.

sourceRegistry.name: Official Steam news hub
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Developer-published patch and announcement facts only; pair gameplay changes with in-game evidence.

sourceRegistry.name: In-game screenshot or recording
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Required to promote a Wiki-backed gameplay fact to in-game verified. Must include the exact game build.

sourceRegistry.name: SteamDB public branch metadata
sourceRegistry.allowedUse: Public Steam branch Build ID only. This does not count as an in-game verification capture.
